name: Fall Guys Collaboration
description:
Get ready to party like the Beans of the Blunderdomeâ”€the Fall Guys collaboration event will be underway from Tuesday, 31 October to Sunday, 31 December! We've updated the special site with more information on the event, as well as a preview of the exclusive rewards players can obtain.
This blunderous event is only a few days away, so keep your eyes on the prizes once the collaboration begins!
View the Fall Guys special site.
* After the initial collaboration event has ended, it will be held as a special event at irregular intervals.

name: Starlight Celebration: Ties to Remember
description:
Wintry weather has settled in across the realm, and the citizens of Eorzea have begun preparing for this year's Starlight Celebration. The time has come to deck the halls with festive decorations and delight others with heartfelt surprisesâ”€who will you remember during this season of giving?
Read on for details.

name: Heavensturn: Tip the Scales in Your Favor
description:
The sun shall soon rise on a new year, and the visiting Far Eastern delegation is most eager to share their Heavensturn traditions with the realm once more. To that end, the ryu metsuke and ryu bugyo have arrived in Limsa Lominsa with a charmingly-costumed chocobo chick to celebrate their draconic guardian...yet the Aftcastle remains notably quiet, and the delegates may require the aid of a capable adventurer to liven up the festivities.
Read on for details.
